### Content Focus Clarification

  - [promptfoo exclusively focuses on generative AI (e.g., ChatGPT, customer chatbots, summarization)](https://fathom.video/share/CxgQ2TyJ7hBbsXsmudBP8TzbzfzN-EGY?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Does not cover traditional machine learning algorithms (e.g., TikTok, Instagram, flight pricing)](https://fathom.video/share/CxgQ2TyJ7hBbsXsmudBP8TzbzfzN-EGY?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Some articles mistakenly covered general machine learning; need realignment](https://fathom.video/share/CxgQ2TyJ7hBbsXsmudBP8TzbzfzN-EGY?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
